content.en:
Remains of the Silent Void Battlefield.

Several of Ye Tian's copy bodies have also become immortal realm level one by one, and the copy body is strong, so naturally it can also go deeper into the battlefield ruins, and there can be more gains.

For example, deeper in the ruins of the Silent Void Battlefield, he had never entered it, because it was densely covered with the power of the Legendary-level Lord, and he had no way to approach it with the cultivation of the Nine Extremes Realm before, and once he approached, he would immediately be killed by the power of the Legendary-level Lord across time and space.

However, now that Ye Tian has broken through to the Eternal Realm and become an Immortal Realm Lord, he is also a three-step Immortal Realm Lord, and his strength is much stronger than the ordinary Immortal Realm, so he has a certain hope of penetrating into the core of the Silent Void Battlefield here.

"Let's try it!"

Ye Tian crossed the many areas of the battlefield ruins in one step, ignoring the dense void fragments and many traces of power.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the area at the core of the Silent Void Battlefield Ruins, and this was a place he couldn't come to before.

Rumble!!!!

The power left by the legendary-level lord was suppressing Ye Tian across time and space, but Ye Tian still relied on his strong strength to resist such suppression.

However, here, it was almost nothing, and even if there were many treasures here, they couldn't withstand the attacks of the legendary lords at all, and they were all shattered, so there was nothing everywhere you looked.

However, Ye Tian still sensed something.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian sensed a fragment, which seemed to be far away, but it seemed to be very close.

"Is it a treasure similar to the True Pathless Scar Tree and the Mystic Sword?"

Ye Tian muttered.

Such a treasure can't even be touched by a legendary-level lord, and he can't touch it at all.

But what he thought of here was just a tiny fragment that he might be able to reach?

So, he forced his way through.

Airplanes!!!!

Layers of space-time barriers hindered Ye Tian, but Ye Tian relied on the power of the Immortal Realm and the powerful power of the rules of will, and reached over with one hand, shattering the layers of space-time barriers, and finally touched that piece of fragment.

Bang!

Ye Tian grabbed this fragment, grabbed it directly, and immediately used all his strength to suppress and suppress this fragment.

After a long time, this fragment was sealed layer by layer by Ye Tian, and it no longer looked so special.

It was a cyan shard, about the size of a palm, and it exuded an aura far beyond the legendary level.

This fragment is enough to be regarded as the most precious item in this ruin world, and it can even be said that it is the most precious item on Ye Tian's body in addition to the copying talent.

Wow!

Ye Tian left here, and immediately found a safe place to carefully understand this fragment.

With the breath of the fragments, Ye Tian's perception passed through the infinite time and space and saw a large bell.

It was a cyan bell, full of endless mystical patterns, and its breath was enough to destroy everything and suppress endless time and space.

Boom!

A bell sounded, passing through infinite time and space, directly shaking Ye Tian's replica body, but fortunately, this force was relatively weak, so it did not kill Ye Tian's replica body.

However, Ye Tian still comprehended the breath from it.

This fragment is a fragment of the green bell, which was struck in a great battle, and this fragment is left behind.

Eternal Treasure.~!", Ye Tian eased these four big words in his mouth.

The cyan bell was an eternal treasure, such as an eternal origin weapon, a treasure weapon that the Void Saint Soldier didn't know how many times more powerful.

The Source Sea Space-Time Territory had never given birth to an Eternal Arcana, so Ye Tian didn't know much about the Eternal Arcana.

But this time, he has gained a lot of inheritance from the ruins, including an introduction to the eternal treasure.

The Eternal Arcana can form the infinite space-time realm, and without a certain strength, it is impossible to touch the Eternal Arcana at all, and the Eternal Arcana can also form a projection, so sometimes the Eternal Arcana you see is not really here, but an endless and distant unknown place.

In addition, although some special objects are not eternal treasures, they are also similar treasures that can also form similar effects.

For example, the True Daoless Trace Tree is obviously not an eternal treasure, but it is a treasure of this grade.

Whether the True Dao Scar Tree and the mysterious sword were really here in the space-time territory, or if it was still a projection, Ye Tian didn't know, because he hadn't reached that strength yet, and he couldn't touch the truth.

However, the piece in front of him was a real eternal treasure fragment, and it was really held in his hand.

Eternal Arcana is not only powerful, but can also have special effects.

As for what special effects this piece of Eternal Treasure Fragment has, Ye Tian is still unclear, and he needs to slowly comprehend it to know.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian continued to study this Eternal Treasure Fragment, and even made a few mistakes, bursting out with the power of the Eternal Treasure Fragment, thus causing the replica body to shatter.

But after studying again and again, he still realized the usefulness of this eternal treasure fragment.

It has three uses for Ye Tian.

The first use, it can briefly form layers of space-time barriers, which can be used to resist other people's attacks, but it consumes a lot of power and can only be used as a hole card.

The second use, it can break down any spatial barriers, such as using it to leave this world of relics, or even enter many places without being restricted.

The third use can be regarded as a real chance, Ye Tian was able to comprehend the various uses of the Eternal Space Dao from this fragment, so as to create the Space Legendary Eternal Technique, and even a more powerful Eternal Technique.

If it is made into a treasure land, it can even allow the human race to comprehend the space eternal technique in such a treasure land.

"It's a pity that it's just a fragment, if it's an eternal treasure that has been completed, how good it would be!" Ye Tian sighed.

But if he thinks about it carefully, if it is really a complete eternal treasure, he can't take it away.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to familiarize himself with this piece of Eternal Treasure Fragment.

After a long time, Ye Tian was ready to leave this relic world.

So, he urged this piece of Eternal Treasure Fragment to directly tear apart the barriers of the ruin world, turning a crack into a crack and easily leaving the ruin world.

He could actually get out of some other rifts, but there must have been many traps set up by the Void Beasts, and there might even be a fifth-order Void Beast attacking him.

But now that he suddenly opened a crack and rushed out of the ruins world, he would inevitably surprise those void beasts, so that he would have time to break through and leave.

Ye Tian only went out to copy the body, and he did not carry the Eternal Arcana Fragment.

As soon as he left the ruins world, Ye Tian's replica body shuttled at an extremely fast speed, and it was uninterrupted.

Rumble!!!!

The fifth-order void beast made a move, chasing and killing Ye Tian.

Along.

Ye Tian continued to attack and block his Void Beast, showing a powerful Immortal Realm combat power.

The fifth-order Void Beast bombarded with a blow, and Ye Tian resisted it with the Will Defense Eternal Technique and the Void True Body, so that he was not killed in an instant, but he was also hit hard.

"~How is this ability a bit like the ability of my clan?"

The fifth-order Void Beast was extremely puzzled.

But Ye Tian was obviously not a void beast, so it didn't keep his hand.

Ye Tian didn't have the idea of fighting the fifth-order void beast at all, he just kept fleeing, and fled far away at all costs.

But in the end, the replica body was killed.

But all this was expected by Ye Tian.

After killing Ye Tian's replica body, this fifth-order void beast left, obviously thinking that Ye Tian was not in that relic (Zhao's) trace world.

And this area also regained its tranquility, and what the fifth-order void beast didn't know was that another copy body that Ye Tian had been staying in this area appeared, and came to an area on Ye Tian's escape path.

Buzz!

A small area of nothingness cracked, and a void ball was called up.

Ye Tian directly took this void ball away and disappeared.

His real purpose in letting a replica body leave the ruins world this time was not to escape, it was just a copy of the body, it didn't matter, there was no need to escape, his real purpose was to send resources.

The replicating body in the outside world lacked resources, so there was no way to continue to condense the replicating body, and if you wanted to replicate the body of the Void Beast and hunt other Void Beasts, it would not be possible to do it at all.

As a result, he had to send away the vast amount of resources he had gathered in the World of Ruins.

Just now, the fifth-order void beast only cared about chasing and killing Ye Tian, plus Ye Tian deliberately covered it up, hiding this void ball.

Now that the resources are in hand, he only needs to leave a copy of the body in the ruins world to comprehend the Eternal Arcana fragment, and the other copy bodies can be condensed in the outside world and plan to hunt the Void Beast.

This is his true perfect plan!_
